name: @estebanforge/pi-codegraph-enhanced
description: Pi-native CodeGraph tools with startup auto-indexing. Fork of @vndv/pi-codegraph that adds automatic index init/resync on every session start: creates the index when missing, incrementally syncs drift, rebuilds on corruption, and skips cleanly when another process holds the lock or the CLI is absent. Same eight codegraph_* tools (search, node, files, callers, callees, impact, explore, status) proxying CodeGraph's MCP server, now with a cancellable, Windows-aware CLI runner and user-visible status feedback.
